title: cast_embed with with: option for nested changeset
prompt: Build MyApp.Accounts.User with an embedded shipping_address (MyApp.Accounts.ShippingAddress). Address has street, city, country, postal_code. Address has its own `validate_changeset/2` function (custom name, not just `changeset/2`). In User's changeset, use cast_embed(:shipping_address, with: &MyApp.Accounts.ShippingAddress.validate_changeset/2). Write both to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires the `with:` option explicitly. Sonnet often falls back to the default changeset name.
